cells.rationale: Canonical path containment, symlink and read-race safety, exact byte budgeting, and cross-harness parity create subtle security and correctness invariants.
Credential scrubbing, independent account routing, process-tree termination, and artifact suppression form a security-critical launcher boundary across multiple core modules.
The hook must preserve native-title authority under overlapping stale operations while remaining fail-open, redacted, lifecycle-neutral, and dependency-light across several integration surfaces.
